name: nginx-multisite
description: Provisions and hardens an Nginx reverse proxy with multiple SSL-enabled virtual hosts (test, ci, status), including self-signed TLS certificate generation, HTTP security headers, rate limiting, UFW firewall rules, Fail2Ban intrusion prevention, sysctl network hardening, and a custom lineinfile LWRP.

name: cache
description: Deploys a dual in-memory caching layer consisting of Memcached (via the memcached community cookbook) and Redis (via the redisio community cookbook) with password authentication, a dedicated log directory, and a post-install config sanitisation workaround to strip deprecated Redis directives.

name: fastapi-tutorial
description: End-to-end deployment of a Python FastAPI application cloned from GitHub, running in a Python virtual environment under uvicorn, backed by a locally-provisioned PostgreSQL database, and managed as a systemd service.
